metadata.scope: RNAV STAR procedures for RKPC RWY 07 and RWY 25; holding patterns excluded.
notes: Designed for the same frontend route rendering pattern as RKSS/RKSI STAR JSON files.
RKPC STAR uses point merge procedures; the original AIP waypoint sequence is preserved.
pointMerge metadata marks sequencing legs so the frontend can render them as a highlighted/smoothed arc if desired.

RKPC-STAR-DOTOL2P.name: DOTOL2P
notes: Parsed from RKPC STAR chart coding tables for map display.
Point Merge procedures are stored as original waypoint sequences; smooth arc rendering should be handled by the frontend if desired.
Holding patterns excluded.
Coordinates from Aeronautical Data Tabulation; geometry.coordinates are [lon, lat].

pointMerge.renderHint: draw-fix-polyline; optionally smooth pointMerge.commonPointMergeLeg for visual arc
